# RAGIMOFF — Professional Psychology School

> Kenan Ragimov (Кенан Рагимов) — psychiatrist, psychotherapist, 23 years of clinical practice. Baku, Azerbaijan. Professional psychology education (DPO diploma + IPAS/BPA international certificates) and individual therapy consultations. Site is bilingual: Azerbaijani (default) and Russian (/ru/).

## About

- [About the author](https://ragimoff.org/haqqimda.html): Psychiatrist, psychotherapist. 23 years of clinical practice. Education background and credentials.
- [Russian version — About](https://ragimoff.org/ru/haqqimda.html)

## Education Programs

- [General Psychology](https://ragimoff.org/program-umumi.html): Foundation psychology course
- [Clinical Psychology DPO](https://ragimoff.org/program-klinik.html): 1528 academic hours, 23 disciplines, DSM-5/ICD-11, CBT, PTSD. State diploma FRDO + IPAS international certificate.
- [Psychotherapy Practicum](https://ragimoff.org/program-praktikum.html): 864 hours of practice (36 live + 36 video × 12 months), IPAS/BPA certificate, supervision.
- [Legal Basis of Psychology Practice](https://ragimoff.org/qanunlar.html)

### Russian versions
- [General Psychology (RU)](https://ragimoff.org/ru/program-umumi.html)
- [Clinical Psychology DPO (RU)](https://ragimoff.org/ru/program-klinik.html): 1528 ак. часов, диплом ДПО ФРДО + сертификат IPAS
- [Psychotherapy Practicum (RU)](https://ragimoff.org/ru/program-praktikum.html): 864 часа практики, сертификат IPAS/BPA

## Therapy Services

- [Family Therapy](https://ragimoff.org/aile-terapiyasi.html) | [RU](https://ragimoff.org/ru/aile-terapiyasi.html)
- [Child-Parent Therapy](https://ragimoff.org/aile-terapiyasi-usaq.html) | [RU](https://ragimoff.org/ru/aile-terapiyasi-usaq.html)
- [Depression Treatment](https://ragimoff.org/depressiya.html) | [RU](https://ragimoff.org/ru/depressiya.html)
- [Panic Attacks](https://ragimoff.org/panik-ataklar.html) | [RU](https://ragimoff.org/ru/panik-ataklar.html)
- [Social Phobia (Social Anxiety)](https://ragimoff.org/sosial-fobiya.html) | [RU](https://ragimoff.org/ru/sosial-fobiya.html)
- [Nocturnal Enuresis (Bedwetting)](https://ragimoff.org/enurez.html) | [RU](https://ragimoff.org/ru/enurez.html)
- [Corporate Programs](https://ragimoff.org/b2b.html) | [RU](https://ragimoff.org/ru/b2b.html)

## Blog — Family & Relationships (RU)

- [5 принципов разрешения семейных конфликтов](https://ragimoff.org/ru/blog-aile.html): Gottman Institute + CBT based principles for resolving couple conflicts
- [7 признаков токсичных отношений](https://ragimoff.org/ru/blog-aile-2.html): Clinical markers distinguishing healthy from toxic relationships
- [Семья на грани развода — лечение или расставание?](https://ragimoff.org/ru/blog-aile-3.html): Clinical criteria for when to save a marriage vs separate; Discernment Counseling model
- [Как правильно спорить в паре?](https://ragimoff.org/ru/blog-aile-4.html): Gottman method — 4 horsemen, soft startup, repair attempts, 20-minute rule
- [Как восстановить доверие после измены?](https://ragimoff.org/ru/blog-aile-5.html): 4-phase clinical protocol for trust recovery

## Blog — Children & Parenting (RU)

- [Проблемы поведения ребёнка — наказание или понимание?](https://ragimoff.org/ru/blog-aile-usaq-2.html): Why punishment fails; Connect Before You Correct approach
- [Ребёнок после развода — как помочь?](https://ragimoff.org/ru/blog-aile-usaq-3.html): Co-parenting model; age-specific reactions; clinical guidance
- [Отказ от школы — 5 настоящих причин](https://ragimoff.org/ru/blog-aile-usaq-4.html): Clinical causes of school refusal and intervention protocol
- [Как правильно говорить ребёнку «нет»?](https://ragimoff.org/ru/blog-aile-usaq-5.html): Healthy boundaries; 4 parenting styles; practical situations

## Blog — Depression (RU)

- [Депрессия](https://ragimoff.org/ru/blog-depressiya.html): Clinical overview
- [Депрессия — статья 2](https://ragimoff.org/ru/blog-depressiya-2.html)
- [Депрессия — статья 3](https://ragimoff.org/ru/blog-depressiya-3.html)

- [Протокол лечения депрессии](https://ragimoff.org/ru/blog-depressiya-protokol.html)
